code:
import io
import string
import list

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut xs: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            xs = list.push(xs, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      xs = list.push(xs, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  xs
end

fn remove_one(_ src: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = list.len(src)
  while i < n
    match list.get(src, i)
    when Some(v)
      if v == target and not removed
        removed = true
      else
        out = list.push(out, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

fn top_k_desc(_ xs: List<Int>, _ k: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut count = 0
  while count < k and list.len(remaining) > 0
    match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      remaining = remove_one(remaining, m)
      count = count + 1
    when None
      count = k
    end
  end
  result
end

fn join_space(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  let n = list.len(xs)
  while j < n
    match list.get(xs, j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  out
end

let nums_line = read_line_or_empty()
let k_line = read_line_or_empty()
let xs = parse_ints(nums_line)
let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(k_line))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end
let picked = top_k_desc(xs, k)
println(join_space(picked))
